Name: WEAPON_REINFORCE_PARAM
Description: Defines weapon upgrade progression, including attack power ranges, damage reduction values, scaling modifiers, elemental reinforcement behavior, and upgrade costs.

Fields.Name: Minimum Physical Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum physical attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Magic Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum magic attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Lightning Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum lightning attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Fire Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum fire attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Dark Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum dark attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Poison Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum poison buildup value for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Bleed Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum bleed buildup value for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Petrification Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum petrification buildup value for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Minimum Curse Attack
Fields.Description: Minimum curse buildup value for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Maximum Physical Attack
Fields.Description: Maximum physical attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Description: Maximum magic attack power for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Description: Maximum petrification buildup value for this reinforcement level.

Fields.Name: Maximum Curse Attack

Fields.Name: Maximum Reinforcement Level
Fields.Description: Highest upgrade level supported by this reinforcement path.

Fields.Name: Stat Scaling Configuration ID
Fields.Description: References the scaling multiplier configuration applied to weapon attributes.

Fields.Description: Percentage of physical damage blocked while guarding.

Fields.Description: Percentage of dark damage blocked while guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard: Poison Resistance (%)
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction to poison buildup while guarding.

Fields.Description: Percentage reduction to bleed buildup while guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard: Petrification Resistance (%)
Fields.Description: Percentage reduction to petrification buildup while guarding.

Fields.Description: Percentage reduction to curse buildup while guarding.
